findings.description: Ora S. Raney was a child of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney, born 20 August 1879 in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio.
supporting_sources: Ohio, Births and Christenings, 1821-1962 / Ohio, County Births, 1841-2003 — entry for Ora S. Raney naming mother Mary L. Ruse.

findings.description: A daughter born 11 April 1887 in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio, was a child of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney. She is recorded under two names in the records — 'Mary L. Raney' on her birth record and 'Bertha Belle Raney' on her later marriage records (b. 11 Apr 1887 in both) — and is a single person; recovering the 1887 daughter under either name satisfies this finding.
supporting_sources: Ohio, Births and Christenings / County Births — entry for Mary L. Raney (11 Apr 1887) naming mother Mary L. Ruse; Ohio Marriages — Bertha Belle Raney (Fruth) naming mother Lavina Ruse.

findings.description: Robert M. Raney (also recorded as Milan/Milen) was a child of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney, born 25 February 1891 in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio.
supporting_sources: Ohio, Births and Christenings, 1821-1962 / Ohio, County Births, 1841-2003 — entry for Robert M. Raney naming mother Mary Ruse.

findings.description: Armedia Elvina (Armeda L.) Raney was a child of Mary L. Ruse and Albert Raney, born about 1882 in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio. (Bonus — indexed under the mother-name variant 'Levina Ruze', so more often found via the father.)
supporting_sources: Ohio, Births and Christenings, 1821-1962 — entry for Armeda L. Raney naming mother Levina Ruze.
